sevenDay.synopsis: Skies are VFR and should remain that way thru the forecast period. Winds will be gusty again today (G20kts) for AM/PM periods, easing up around sunset. The next three days look uneventful. Another weak boundary will swing thru this weekend, but right now it looks like a dry front, so the only noticeable change will be a slight dip in temperatures and gusty winds.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 24 MAR - 30 MAR
